title: Bold Black & Yellow Construction Party Zone Block Banner (2.7 meters) 1 Piece - Perfect Design for Fun Events
features: CONSTRUCTION PARTY ZONE BLOCK BANNER: Transform your event space with this eye-catching bold black & yellow banner, perfect for adding a fun and exciting construction-themed touch to any party atmosphere.

BOLD BLACK & YELLOW DESIGN: The vibrant colors and high-quality graphics of this 2.7-meter-long banner command attention and create a distinctive backdrop for an unforgettable experience, making your party truly stand out.

PERFECT FOR FUN EVENTS: Whether it's a birthday celebration, office gathering, or themed social event, this construction party zone block banner is your go-to decoration to enhance the energy and excitement of your special occasion.

PERFECT SIZE: Measuring 2.7 meters in length, this 1-piece banner provides ample coverage and space for customization, allowing you to showcase a striking display either indoors or outdoors for maximum impact.

EASY SETUP & DURABLE MATERIAL: Our 1-piece banner is made from a sturdy, all-weather material that's simple to install and hang on walls, fences, or other structures for long-lasting enjoyment, making your event a smashing success.
description: From the manufacturer Pumpkin Orange Midnight Black Powder Blue Ruby Red Construction Birthday Add-On Items Hard hats at the ready! Build an amazing Birthday party around these designs, perfect for the little construction worker in your life! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Construction Party isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
